description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a prominent glass-enclosed veranda at the front. The facade features large rectangular windows arranged in a grid pattern, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The house includes a covered outdoor area supported by columns, with visible patio furniture and potted plants, suggesting a comfortable space for relaxation. On one side, there are several tall palm trees, adding a touch of greenery and a contemporary urban vibe. The rear and side elevations are more minimal, with fewer windows and a clean, geometric design. The overall structure is characterized by straight lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large grid windows, a glass veranda, and palm trees accenting the exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass veranda, large grid windows, and covered patio area with visible furniture and plants.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, the depth of the veranda, and the cluster of palm trees adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, a clean geometric wall, and palm trees visible to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the large windows, the open veranda, and a glimpse of the rooftop greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large grid windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a glass door under a covered veranda with columns and integrated patio space.
